backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that holds a list of 10 trivia facts and exposes two query/update methods: one to get the array size and one to return a random fact using a crypto RNG.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three product features (fire animation, random fact button, fire-themed design) to their implementing source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document containing one-line summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the project's frontend structure.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point that defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme design tokens (colors, radius, sidebar, charts).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell titled 'Fire Facts' that mounts the React app at the `#root` div and loads the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that simply renders the FireFactsPage as the sole page of the application.
frontend/src/components/FactDisplay.tsx: Fire-themed card component with a 'Get a Random Fact' button that fetches a fact from the backend via mutation and displays it with a smooth reveal animation using inline styles.
frontend/src/components/FireAnimation.ts: Animated fire component that renders layered flames, logs, coals, smoke, and ground glow using inline styles, with JavaScript-spawned ember particles via setInterval.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor, using the current Internet Identity and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout state, and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Typed React Query mutation hook that calls the backend's `getRandomFact` method via the ICP actor and returns the result as a string.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives, imports Google Fonts (Cinzel, Inter), defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the dark fire-themed design system, and declares keyframe animations for fire effects (flame flicker, coal glow, smoke rise, etc.).
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with ReactQuery and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/FireFactsPage.tsx: Main page component that composes the full fire-themed UI layout including a header, FireAnimation component, FactDisplay component, and a footer with a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with OKLCH color tokens, Cinzel/Inter font families, custom border radii, accordion keyframes, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking existing features (fire animation, random fact button, fire-themed design) and a pending new feature request (AR-4) to store facts in a Motoko backend and expose a getRandomFact() query method.
